what: Merge keyword and semantic results with deduplication
why: Combine both search strategies into a single ranked result set without duplicates

output.console: Merged result count with deduplication stats

success_handling.criteria: Keyword and semantic results are merged, duplicates removed, and final ranking computed from combined scores

event.message: Merged results: {merged_count} unique entries from {keyword_count} keyword + {semantic_count} semantic

error_handling.criteria: Unable to combine result sets (incompatible formats, scoring normalization error)
error_handling.action: Fall back to keyword results only, log warning

event.message: Result merge failed, using keyword results only: {error}

decisions.outcome: Use keyword results as fallback, proceed to output-results step
